achievementCompleted.title: You Earned a Reward!
achievementCompleted.body: Nice work! You just completed an achievement. Tap to claim your coins before they expire.

connectionRequestAccepted.title: You're Connected!
connectionRequestAccepted.body: {userName} accepted your request — say hello and start a conversation!

createAMomentReminder.title: Share What You're Up To
createAMomentReminder.body: Drop a moment at your favorite spot — a quick review, a photo, or something fun. Your friends nearby will discover it later!

completeDraftReminder.title: Your Draft Is Waiting
completeDraftReminder.body: You started a post but never shared it — finish it up and let your community see what you've been up to!

createYourProfileReminder.title: Finish Setting Up Your Profile
createYourProfileReminder.body: You're almost there! Pick a username and add a photo so people in your area can find you.

discoveredUniqueMoment.title: You Found Something Special!
discoveredUniqueMoment.body: There's a rare moment nearby — open the map to check it out.

discoveredUniqueSpace.title: Hidden Gem Alert!
discoveredUniqueSpace.body: You're near a unique space — tap to explore what makes it special.

latestPostLikesStats.title: Your Post Is Getting Love
latestPostLikesStats.body: Your latest post just hit {likeCount} likes! Keep sharing to grow your local following.

latestPostViewcountStats.title: People Are Watching
latestPostViewcountStats.body: Your latest post has reached {viewCount} views — your community is paying attention.

newDirectMessage.title: New Message
newDirectMessage.body: You have unread messages from {userName} — tap to reply

newGroupMessage.title: New Group Message
newGroupMessage.body: You have unread messages in {groupName} — jump in and join the conversation

newGroupInvite.title: You're Invited!
newGroupInvite.body: {fromUserName} invited you to join {groupName} — tap to check it out

newSuperLikeReceived.title: You Got a Super Like!
newSuperLikeReceived.body: {userName} super-liked your post — they really love it!

newThoughtReplyReceived.title: New Reply to Your Post
newThoughtReplyReceived.body: {userName} replied to your post — see what they said

newAreasActivated.title: New Spots Unlocked!
newAreasActivated.body: You just unlocked {totalAreasActivated} new area(s) — explore what's been shared nearby

nudgeSpaceEngagement.title: Earn Rewards Right Now
nudgeSpaceEngagement.body: You're near a spot with rewards — check in to claim cash back and discounts!

unclaimedAchievementsReminder.title: Rewards Waiting for You
unclaimedAchievementsReminder.body: You have {achievementsCount} unclaimed reward(s) — don't let them go to waste!

unreadNotificationsReminder.title: You've Got Updates
unreadNotificationsReminder.body: You have {notificationsCount} new notification(s) — tap to catch up

inviteFriendsReminder.title: Bring Your Crew Along
inviteFriendsReminder.body: Share your invite link and you'll both earn rewards when your friends join!

streakAtRisk.title: Don't Break Your Streak
streakAtRisk.body: Your {streakCount}-day {habitName} streak is on the line — check in before midnight to keep it alive.

streakBroken.title: Streak Reset
streakBroken.body: Your {streakCount}-day {habitName} streak ended — start a new one today.

streakMilestone.title: Milestone Hit!
streakMilestone.body: {streakCount} days strong on {habitName} — keep the momentum going.

newPersonalRecord.title: New Personal Record
newPersonalRecord.body: You just beat your old {habitName} record of {previousRecordDays} days. Now at {streakCount}!

partnerCheckedIn.title: {partnerName} Just Checked In
partnerCheckedIn.body: {partnerName} hit Day {streakCount} on {habitName} — don't let them lap you.

partnerCelebrated.title: {partnerName} Sent a Celebration
partnerCelebrated.body: {partnerName} just cheered you on — open the app to see what they said.

pactInvitation.title: You've Been Invited to a Pact
pactInvitation.body: {userName} invited you to do {habitName} together — accountability starts here.

pactAccepted.title: Pact Accepted!
pactAccepted.body: {partnerName} is in. You're both committed to {habitName} — first check-in starts the streak.

pactDeclined.title: Pact Declined
pactDeclined.body: {partnerName} can't commit to this one. Invite someone else to keep the goal alive.

pactCompleted.title: Pact Complete!
pactCompleted.body: You and {partnerName} finished your {habitName} pact — that's a win for both of you.

pactExpiring.title: Pact Wrapping Up Soon
pactExpiring.body: {daysRemaining} day(s) left on your {habitName} pact — finish strong.

dailyHabitReminder.title: Time to Check In
dailyHabitReminder.body: Don't forget to log {habitName} today — a quick tap keeps your streak alive.

morningMotivation.title: Good Morning
morningMotivation.body: Today is a fresh chance to build the habit you committed to. Let's go.

eveningCheckIn.title: How Did Today Go?
eveningCheckIn.body: Tap to log your check-in and lock in another day on your streak.

validation: The required parameters were not provided.
